description: Amplitude, frequency, pulse, and pulse-code modulation. Narrow-band noise representation and signal-to-noise ratios for various modulation schemes. Pulse shaping, timing recovery, carrier synchronization, and equalization. Sampling, quantization and coding.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (E C E 203or330), graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (E C E 203or330), graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students
